name: Jigsaw Gems
author: Poki
description: Jigsaw Gems is a retro-styled puzzle game full of challenging jigsaw puzzles to complete! For each puzzle you solve, you earn Gems, that you can use to unlock more level packs. There's 10 different packs of awesome puzzles to discover! You can also take on Daily and Weekly challenges to keep your skills sharp and earn even more Gems! Can you piece together all the puzzles and become a jigsaw master? How to play Jigsaw Gems? Use the mouse to drag pieces around and solve the puzzles! Who created Jigsaw Gems? Jigsaw Gems was created by Monoinyo. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Jigsaw Gems for free? You can play Jigsaw Gems for free on Poki. Can I play Jigsaw Gems on mobile devices and desktop? Jigsaw Gems can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
